positive: A highly detailed, dramatic portrait of an elven warrior standing on a cliff overlooking a misty valley. The character is wearing intricate leather armor and holding a glowing sword. Epic fantasy concept art, volumetric lighting, cinematic, octane render, deep saturation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, amateur drawing, simplistic, cartoonish
